caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders, a bow tie, glasses, and a large, grey, stylized wig. He wears over-ear headphones and sits before a professional microphone. Behind him, the wall is decorated with various framed photos and clothing items, including a "LEE" branded garment. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears on the screen. In the initial moments, the man has both hands raised to his head, adjusting the wig. As the scene progresses, he lowers his hands and begins to speak, shifting his expression and slightly tilting his head while looking forward. The background and equipment remain static throughout the sequence, focusing the action on the man's movements and facial expressions.
